mapper.select: /* wms-inventory-atmc-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatInfoMap - 재고 속성 조회 SQL */ SELECT CTKEY , IVATKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , PRODUCTDATE , EXPIREDATE , ATTRIBUTE1 , ATTRIBUTE2 , ATTRIBUTE3 , ATTRIBUTE4 , ATTRIBUTE5 , PRODUCTLOT , IVATSTATUS , IBCONFIRMDATE , LOGGRPCD , ACKEY , STORE_KEY , ATTRIBUTE6 , ATTRIBUTE7 , ATTRIBUTE8 , ATTRIBUTE9 , IDNTFC_NO , BDDR_GNRL_ITEM_IBYN , CON_QTY , NET_WGT , CFQTY , PLT_TYPE , PLT_LOAD_QTY , PLT_LOAD_HEIGHT FROM TWORK_INFO_IVAT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ICKEY = #{ickey} AND UOM = #{uom} AND EXPIREDATE = #{expiredate}
/* wms-inventory-atmc-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatkeyGen - 재고 속성 키 조회 SQL */ SELECT FN_GET_KEYCOUNT_IVAT(#{ctkey} , #{surkey}) AS IVATKEY

/* wms-inventory-atmc-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatxlculc - 재고 조회 SQL */ SELECT CTKEY , IVATKEY , LCKEY , ULCKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , TTQTY , AVQTY , ALQTY , PIQTY , PAQTY , LOQTY , HOQTY , IVATSTATUS FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ICKEY = #{ickey} AND LCKEY = #{lckey} AND IVATKEY = #{ivatkey}
mapper.insert: /* wms-inventory-atmc-sql-oracle.xml - insertIvatxlculc - 재고 등록 SQL */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC ( CTKEY , IVATKEY , LCKEY , ULCKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , TTQTY , AVQTY , ALQTY , PIQTY , PAQTY , LOQTY , HOQTY , IVATSTATUS , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY , LOGGRPCD ) VALUES ( #{ctkey} , #{ivatkey} , #{lckey} , COALESCE(#{ulckey}, 'NA') , #{owkey} , #{ickey} , (#{normalqty} * #{icutqty}) + (#{hoqty} * #{icutqty}) , (#{normalqty} * #{icutqty}) , 0 , 0 , 0 , 0 , (#{hoqty} * #{icutqty}) , '10' , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{loggrpcd} )
